prestazioni: Engine swap to a Nissan VQ30DET (3.0L V6 twin-turbo, 300-400hp potential) with a custom billet crankshaft from Tomei and forged JE pistons (8.5:1 compression) for high-boost applications, paired with a Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger and a custom 4-inch stainless steel exhaust system by HKS Hi-Power.

Full drivetrain reinforcement including a Nismo 4.375 final drive ratio LSD, OS Giken Super Lock differential, and a custom driveshaft by Driveshaft Shop to handle the increased torque, along with a 6-speed manual transmission swap from a Nissan 350Z (CD009) with a PPG short-throw shifter.

Custom ECU tuning via Haltech Elite 2500 with flex-fuel capability, integrated with a Link G4+ knock control system, AEM X-Series wideband O2 sensors, and a custom intercooler setup featuring a GReddy Type-R front-mount intercooler with a 3-inch piping system and dual 1000cc ID injectors from Injector Dynamics.
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (Expert-specific) with custom carbon fiber overfenders, front splitter, and rear diffuser, paired with a custom 3-piece Work Meister S1 3P 18x9.5 +22 front and 18x11 +30 rear wheels wrapped in Toyo R888R 255/40/18 and 295/35/18 tires.

Custom roll cage by Cusco (Type-RS) with integrated harness bar, painted in Nissan Racing Orange (407), paired with Bride Zeta III bucket seats and Takata Drift II 4-point harnesses, along with a custom MOMO Prototipo steering wheel on a NRG quick-release hub.

Full custom livery by Fatlace Designs featuring a matte black base with Nissan Racing-inspired teal and white accents, including a custom rear wing (Voltex Type-7) and a shaved roof with a custom sunroof delete panel, finished with custom LED taillights by VLEDS and a carbon fiber hood by Seibon.
